name: bincalc
$comment: Pin every vcpkg port to the versions at this vcpkg registry release (2026.05.25). Bumping this SHA is what moves Qt to a new minor/patch — it keeps release builds reproducible instead of floating on vcpkg HEAD. Only consumed when CMake runs with the vcpkg toolchain (the Release workflow); qmake/local builds and the install-qt-action CI build ignore it.
